C:\Qt\Tools\CMake_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\unit_tests.dir/objects.a
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\unit_tests.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\unit_tests.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\unit_tests.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o unit_tests.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libunit_tests.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\unit_tests.dir\linkLibs.rsp
